title: Sales Manager Vacancy at ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd:
ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd!
